job.jobDescription: Northstar Digital is looking for a Junior Frontend Developer to build accessible web interfaces for client projects. You will work with designers and backend developers to deliver responsive features. Requirements: solid JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and React knowledge; familiarity with Git and REST APIs; attention to detail; and clear communication. Experience with TypeScript, unit testing, and agile delivery is an advantage.

resumeText:
Aina Rahman
aina.rahman@example.com

Junior web developer with hands-on experience building responsive interfaces.

Skills
JavaScript, HTML, CSS, React, Git, Figma

Experience
Frontend Project Intern — Built React components for a student events platform, collaborated with a designer, and used Git for version control.

Education
Diploma in Information Technology
